name: Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual tracking causes cash flow gaps. We consolidate expense data instead of manual tracking and spreadsheet management.
problem_solved: Difficulty in consolidating expense data for accurate monthly bookkeeping.
features: Expense data extraction from multiple sources

locked_fields.primary_problem: Difficulty in consolidating expense data for accurate monthly bookkeeping.

must_have_features: Expense data extraction from multiple sources
